title: Services people in Türkiye often compare for a Netherlands move
intro: Document legalisation, translations, planning tools, transfers, housing, and insurance—useful alongside MVV, VFS Global short-stay steps, and residence permit timing.

items.reason: Map apostille and legalisation when Turkish documents must be accepted in the Netherlands.
Plan sworn translations when Dutch authorities need Dutch, English, French, or German text.
Organise document categories before MVV, entry, or municipality submissions.
Turn your route into a phased checklist with ?from=turkey context.
Sequence BSN, banking, and insurance in your first weeks after landing.
Move TRY and EUR with transparent pricing while you coordinate deposits and rent.
Digital Dutch banking often used soon after BSN and address.
Traditional Dutch banking option some employers and landlords recognise easily.
Short and mid-term listings while you search for a long-term rental in Amsterdam, Rotterdam, or beyond.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.
Dutch SIM options after you land.
